rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND B SIMMONS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT BRYAN et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why A Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Issue
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 29, 2013, line 6. Order To Show Cause Why A Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Issued GRANTED. Plaintiff sufficiently shows compliance with modification terms. Defendant provides no contrary proof. Plaintiff shall post $257,048 (payments due under modification agreement from 2009 to present) with the Court no later than June 3, 2013. = (501/AJR)
